description_en: Create a traditional Chinese square table with a flat top and apron under the top, featuring four legs.

components.name: top_board
components.description: The flat top of the table

components.name: apron
components.description: The apron under the top of the table

style_notes: The table should have a traditional Chinese style, with legs that are slightly thicker than the top and apron. The joinery should be mortise and tenon, and the surface should be smooth with a natural finish.
